context: Tests whether the agent extracts shared logic into a template file using correct parameter syntax, fixes the ubuntu-latest vmImage, adds displayName to all steps, adds caching, and uses the template from the main pipeline with the correct reference syntax.

checklist.name: Template file created
checklist.description: A file `templates/build-service.yml` (or similar path) exists and contains reusable step or job definitions

checklist.name: Parameter syntax correct
checklist.description: The template uses `${{ parameters.name }}` syntax for parameter references (not $(parameters.name) or other forms)

checklist.name: Template referenced from main
checklist.description: The main `azure-pipelines.yml` references the template using `- template:` syntax for all four services

checklist.name: Pinned vmImage
checklist.description: The vmImage is changed from `ubuntu-latest` to a specific version (e.g., ubuntu-22.04)

checklist.name: Cache@2 in template
checklist.description: The build template includes a Cache@2 task for npm packages

checklist.name: displayName on all steps
checklist.description: Every task and script step in both the template and main pipeline has a displayName property

checklist.name: PublishTestResults with succeededOrFailed
checklist.description: The PublishTestResults@2 task in the template has `condition: succeededOrFailed()`

checklist.name: No @latest task usage
checklist.description: No task in any generated file uses @latest version

checklist.name: Parameters for nodeVersion
checklist.description: The template defines a parameter for the Node.js version (so each service can specify 18.x or 20.x)

checklist.name: Parameters for artifactName
checklist.description: The template defines a parameter for the artifact name (so api-drop, worker-drop, etc. are set per-service)

checklist.name: Explicit trigger preserved
checklist.description: The main pipeline retains the explicit trigger with main and develop branch includes
